description_long: This is a medium-sized yacht with a sleek, elongated hull painted in a striking red color along the waterline and a gray upper structure. The vessel features a flat, open deck with multiple raised sections, including a central cabin and several equipment housings. Railings run along the perimeter of the deck, providing safety and structure, while a prominent mast and rigging are visible amidships. The deck is equipped with various nautical fixtures, such as hatches, vents, and what appear to be gun mounts or observation posts. The bow and stern are both sharply defined, with the bow slightly more pointed and the stern squared off. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, possibly military or patrol function, with minimal luxury features visible.
description: A sleek, red-and-gray yacht with a flat open deck, central cabin, and prominent mast, featuring railings and multiple deck fixtures.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the yacht, red hull, gray deck, and central mast with rigging.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow bow, central deck structures, and visible railings along the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull, deck fixtures, and mast.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the squared stern, deck layout, and the arrangement of equipment along the centerline.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, straight sheer line, and a pronounced red color along the waterline. The hull features a flat transom stern and a pointed bow, with no visible keels or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with multiple raised structures, including a central cabin and equipment housings. Railings run along both sides, and the deck is equipped with hatches, vents, and a prominent mast amidships.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main central cabin structure with a low, angular profile, no visible windows or doors from these views, and several smaller deck fixtures distributed fore and aft.
